title: Coastal branch geography alignment before Coastal Scrub
summary: Ninth structured packet for Eco Explorer. The new science ledger found a real mixed-region problem in the planned coastal branch: the live beach and draft Coastal Scrub targets combine Atlantic or Mid-Atlantic species with a Pacific forest and treeline branch. The smallest science-safe fix is to align the coastal side to a Pacific gradient before Coastal Scrub scaffolding continues.

execution_order.goal: Compare the three realistic ways to resolve the mixed Atlantic and Pacific coastal branch, then recommend one path with minimum changes.
execution_order.why_now: Coastal Scrub should not be scaffolded from a contradictory science base when the conflict is already visible in the source ledger.

execution_order.goal: Realign the live beach content, the already-landed Coastal Scrub implementation, and the source docs to a Pacific gradient before further coastal-branch work.
execution_order.why_now: The Coastal Scrub review confirmed that the mixed-coast issue is now present in real code, not just in planning docs.

guardrails: Treat the beach-to-forest side as one continuous ecosystem gradient, not a mixed-coast postcard route.
Choose the Pacific coastal gradient path unless a deliberate product decision explicitly changes the world map to separate locales.
Prefer the smallest replacements that preserve gameplay roles such as dune grass, shore invertebrate, and beach collectible rhythm.
Use accepted names when taxonomy has shifted, and avoid carrying outdated names forward into new content docs.
Keep broad species only when they do not reintroduce the same geography conflict.
Update the implemented Coastal Scrub biome and any supporting tests or docs in the same pass so the repo stops carrying two competing coastal truths.
acceptance_focus: The beach-to-forest side reads as one Pacific coastal branch instead of a mixed Atlantic and Pacific collage.
The strongest Atlantic anchors are removed or replaced in both the live beach and the landed Coastal Scrub biome.
The Coastal Scrub target list becomes regionally coherent without weakening the facilitation lesson.
Future ecotone work can proceed from one cleaned coastal source of truth instead of reopening geography ad hoc.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, docs/science-source-ledger.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-coastal-branch-geography-handoff.md, docs/reports/2026-03-28-coastal-scrub-review.md, docs/ecotone-design.md, docs/world-travel.md, and this packet. Align the beach side to a Pacific coastal gradient by replacing the strongest Atlantic anchors in the live beach and the already-landed Coastal Scrub biome, then update the source docs so the branch stays science-coherent.
